results.question: Which supplier has the most parts in the region with the lowest revenue?
results.generated_sql:
WITH regional_revenue AS (
    SELECT r.r_name, SUM(l.total_value * (1 - l.promo_reduction)) as revenue

    JOIN region r ON n.n_regionkey = r.r_regionkey
    GROUP BY r.r_name
),
top_supplier AS (
    SELECT s.s_suppkey, s.s_name, COUNT(p.ps_partkey) as part_count
    FROM supplier s
    JOIN partsupp ps ON s.s_suppkey = ps.ps_suppkey
    JOIN region r ON s.s_nationkey = r.n_nationkey
    JOIN nation n ON r.n_nationkey = n.n_nationkey
    WHERE r.r_name = (SELECT r_name FROM regional_revenue ORDER BY revenue ASC LIMIT 1)
    GROUP BY s.s_suppkey, s.s_name
)
SELECT t1.s_name FROM top_supplier t1 JOIN supplier s ON t1.s_suppkey = s.s_suppkey

results.question: What percentage of total revenue comes from each region?
results.generated_sql:
WITH regional_revenue AS (
    SELECT r.r_name, SUM(l.total_value * (1 - l.promo_reduction)) as revenue
    FROM region r
    JOIN nation n ON r.r_regionkey = n.n_regionkey
    JOIN supplier s ON n.n_nationkey = s.s_nationkey
    JOIN lineitem l ON s.s_suppkey = l.l_suppkey
    GROUP BY r.r_name
),
total_revenue AS (
    SELECT SUM(revenue) as total_revenue
    FROM regional_revenue
)
SELECT r.r_name, (revenue / total_revenue) * 100 as percentage_of_total_revenue
FROM regional_revenue r
JOIN total_revenue tr ON r.r_name = tr.r_name

FROM

results.question: What if we increased the discount by 10%? How would that affect total revenue?
results.generated_sql:
WITH discounted_lineitem AS (
    SELECT 
        l.l_orderkey,
        l.l_partkey,
        l.l_suppkey,
        l.l_linenumber,
        l.l_quantity,
        l.l_extendedprice,
        l.l_discount,
        l.l_tax,
        l.l_returnflag,
        l.linestatus,
        l.shipdate,
        l.commitdate,
        l_receiptdate,
        l.shipinstruct,
        l.shipmode,
        l.comment,
        l.promo_reduction,
        l.total_value,
        CASE 
            WHEN l.discount_percentage IS NULL THEN l.discount
            ELSE l.discount * (1 + 0.10)
        END AS discounted_discount,
        CASE 
            WHEN l.discount_percentage IS NULL THEN l.total_value
            ELSE l.total_value * (1 - l.discount * (1 + 0.10))
        END AS discounted_total_value
    FROM 
        lineitem l
)
SELECT 
    r.r_name,
    SUM(discarded_lineitem.discounted_total_value) as total_revenue
FROM 
    region r
JOIN 
    orders o ON r.r_regionkey = o.o_regionkey
JOIN 
    customer c ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey
JOIN 
    lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
JOIN 
    discounted_lineitem dl ON l.l_orderkey = dl.l_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    r.r_name;
results.gold_sql: WITH original AS (SELECT SUM(total_value * (1 - promo_reduction)) AS original_revenue FROM lineitem), simulated AS (SELECT SUM(total_value * (1 - LEAST(promo_reduction * 1.1, 1.0))) AS simulated_revenue FROM lineitem) SELECT o.original_revenue, s.simulated_revenue, s.simulated_revenue - o.original_revenue AS difference, ROUND(((s.simulated_revenue - o.original_revenue) / o.original_revenue) * 100, 2) AS pct_change FROM original o CROSS JOIN simulated s;
